description: Execute design scenario for stricter malformed ABC validation using the smaller runtime_core docs mirror.

invocation.workItemTitle: Design stricter malformed ABC validation flow
invocation.summary: Produce a design doc for stricter malformed ABC validation using the smaller runtime_core docs mirror repository.
invocation.issueBody: Ground the design in docs/bc_verification, assembler-facing responsibilities, verifier-related tests, and validation strategy. No code changes are allowed.
extraInstructions: Describe the fixed staged workflow as code-defined by task type, with request-specific context layered on top.
Reference docs/bc_verification and verifier-related tests explicitly.
Call out assembler and verifier responsibilities separately.
